summary: Sprint 1 CASP Operating Stack — full backend regression (36/36 pytest pass) + frontend admin console smoke (sidebar nav, dashboard KPIs, USER access-denied, 8 subpages). All 7 MiCAR blocks operational with mock provider adapters. 4-eye OTC approval enforced correctly. Hash-chained audit log verifies clean. Legacy /api/auth/* + Transak partner key still respond.
frontend_assertions_verified: casp-admin login -> /dashboard then /admin loads CASP CONSOLE with sidebar containing exactly 9 nav items: Dashboard, KYC / KYB, AML & Alerts, Treasury, OTC Desk B2B, Reporting, Customer Protection, Governance, Audit Log

Dashboard KPI cards render all 7 tiles: KYC PENDING 2 / 3 approved; AML OPEN ALERTS 5 / 2 critical; OTC PENDING 3 / €900,000 settled 30d; CUSTODIAL WALLETS 7 hot+cold; OPEN COMPLAINTS 4 SLA 15d; CAPITAL ADEQUACY €280,000 COMPLIANT 224%; AUDIT CHAIN VERIFIED 24 entries
All 8 subpages /admin/{compliance,aml,treasury,otc,reporting,protection,governance,audit} load with 0 error-class elements and 0 page-error events

institutional@bigcorp.example.com (base role=USER) hitting /admin renders 'Access denied — The CASP back-office is restricted to ADMIN users. Your account (institutional@bigcorp.example.com) has role USER.' panel
Header shows MICAR · REG. (EU) 2023/1114 badge + 'CASP Operating Stack — Shadow Mode ● Live v0.1.0'

rbac_matrix_verified.casp-trader (base ADMIN, casp OTC_TRADER: casp-trader self-approves own quote -> 400 'self approval forbidden' (4-eye guard fires even for super-admin)

critical_code_review_comments: middleware/casp_rbac.py: super-admin bypass (base role=ADMIN returns immediately with casp_roles=['ADMIN']) is documented and intentional — but it means seeded specialised users (casp-mlro, casp-trader, casp-risk, casp-treasury) ALL carry base ADMIN role per seed_casp.py, so the CASP role gate is effectively bypassed for them. The test 'OTC_TRADER blocked from /aml/alerts/{id}/resolve which needs MLRO' from the request CANNOT be exercised end-to-end because casp-trader has base ADMIN and therefore inherits MLRO permissions too. Mitigation suggestion to main agent: when seeding non-super-admin specialists, set base role to e.g. CASP_OPERATOR (a new sub-admin role) instead of ADMIN, so casp-role gates actually constrain them. The 4-eye guard (self-approval) is correctly enforced regardless, which is the real safety net.

routes/casp.py:259-261 and :267-269: pattern `if result.get('error'): raise HTTPException(400, detail=result)` — clean and works, but consider raising specific error codes from the service layer instead of marshalling a dict (less risk of leaking internal state in detail body).

routes/casp.py:344: 'Only ADMIN can manage admin users' — this guard is correct but the dependency already lets non-super CASP roles in via require_any_admin; consider making it a dedicated require_super_admin dependency for clarity.
Audit hash-chain (24 entries after seed + 12 new test mutations) verifies in <30ms — implementation is solid. Verified field is correctly true after running test_casp.py end-to-end.

Provider adapters (Sumsub/Chainalysis/Fireblocks/Notabene) intentionally in MOCK mode per spec — NOT a bug. Screen-address returns deterministic risk_score in [0,100] and auto-creates CRITICAL alert when score>=85, as expected.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_casp.py (new — 36 pytest cases covering all 7 MiCAR blocks + RBAC matrix + 4-eye + audit verify + legacy regression)
test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — CASP back-office seeded accounts, password CaspAdmin!2026 (casp-admin / casp-mlro / casp-trader / casp-risk / casp-treasury / institutional@bigcorp). Ephemeral USER for RBAC negative test created via /api/auth/register with TEST_<uuid>@example.com.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data from scripts/seed_casp.py. Test side-effects: 1 freshly resolved AML alert, 1 reconciliation, 1 frozen wallet, 1 new PoR snapshot, 1 OTC quote (BUY 5 BTC @ €60k, APPROVED by MLRO then EXECUTED by trader), 1 MiCAR report, 1 capital snapshot (€280k), 1 TEST complaint. All TEST_ prefixed where applicable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CASP Sprint 1 fully green. When provider adapters switch from MOCK to LIVE in future sprints, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_casp.py — TestBlock2_AML.test_screen_address_returns_risk_score and TestBlock3_Custody (PoR/freeze/reconcile) will need live-key fixtures. RBAC test 'OTC_TRADER blocked from MLRO operation' is currently NOT enforceable because seeded specialists all carry base role=ADMIN (super-admin bypass). Recommend main agent introduces a sub-admin base role for specialists if true role isolation is needed beyond the 4-eye guard. The 4-eye self-approval guard IS enforced and is the operational safety net.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. One semantic gap documented above (super-admin bypass makes per-CASP-role gating moot for seeded specialists). The 4-eye OTC self-approval rule overrides the super-admin shortcut, so even casp-trader (base ADMIN) cannot self-approve their own quote — confirmed 400 with self_approval_forbidden detail.
